network_summary: Dr. Anna M. Pelak DDS (Loyola 1987, 35+ years experience) owns and operates two GP dental offices in the northwest suburbs of Chicago under the consumer brand 'Total Dentistry': (1) 647 N. 1st Bank Dr, Palatine IL 60067 (TOTALIDLLC entity) and (2) 1296 S Sutton Rd, Streamwood IL 60107 (ARTOFASMILE entity, now branded Total Dentistry Streamwood). Both locations are listed on totaldentistry.org. The Palatine address also has a third NPI record 'ANNA PELAK & ASSOC' (org_only_npi, same phone/address as TOTALIDLLC) — that is an administrative org shell, not a separate physical clinic. No DSO/MSO/PE/management-company involvement found. The website explicitly describes the practice as 'local, family-owned' and notes it absorbed Sutton Lake Dental, Streamwood Family Dental, and Dr. Mark Pusateri's practice into the Total Dentistry family — organic consolidation by the founding dentist.

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Location 36f2d7b78f905184 (ANNA PELAK & ASSOC, 647 1st bank dr, Palatine) shares the same phone (847-358-2477) and effectively the same address as location 1cb279f97b785d5f (TOTALIDLLC, 647 N 1st Bank Dr, Palatine) — these are the same physical clinic represented by two NPI records (one org-only NPI for the association entity, one for the LLC operating entity). The deduplication pipeline kept both because the normalized address strings differ slightly ('647 1st bank dr' vs '647 n 1st bank dr'). The org_only_npi record (ANNA PELAK & ASSOC, provider_count=0) should be flagged as a potential duplicate_location of the TOTALIDLLC record. It is currently classified 'solo_established' in practice_locations but the underlying NPI in practices is 'org_only_npi' — that discrepancy warrants review.
evidence_chain: AO signal: Anna Pelak appears as authorized official (OWNER/CEO) on 3 NPPES organization NPIs across 2 ZIPs (60067 Palatine, 60107 Streamwood). Documentary corroboration: (1) totaldentistry.org/about and totaldentistry.org/ both list Palatine (647 N. 1st Bank Dr) and Streamwood (1296 S Sutton Rd) as the two Total Dentistry locations under Dr. Pelak's ownership; (2) the Streamwood NPI (ARTOFASMILE) has website field 'Totaldentistry-Streamwood.Business.Site' confirming brand unity; (3) ARTOFASMILE mailing address points to the Palatine office (centralized admin); (4) Vitals, WebMD, DentalPlans, Healthgrades, LocalMed, Barrington Chamber all confirm Dr. Anna M. Pelak DDS as the sole owner/dentist at both locations; (5) No MSO, management company, PE sponsor, or DSO platform found in any source.
future_app_notes: Flag location 36f2d7b78f905184 (ANNA PELAK & ASSOC) as likely duplicate_location of 1cb279f97b785d5f (TOTALIDLLC) — same physical address and phone, org_only_npi in practices but solo_established in practice_locations. If resolved as duplicate, this network has exactly 2 distinct GP locations: Palatine (TOTALIDLLC) and Streamwood (ARTOFASMILE). Dr. Pelak has absorbed at least 3 previously independent practices (Sutton Lake Dental, Streamwood Family Dental, Dr. Mark Pusateri's practice) into Total Dentistry — worth monitoring for further organic growth. No web evidence of any pending sale or DSO affiliation.
